hooks.command: sid=$(jq -r ".session_id // \"nosession\""); d=$({ git diff HEAD -- "*.nix" 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached -- "*.nix" 2>/dev/null; }); [ -z "$d" ] && exit 0; h=$(printf "%s" "$d" | sha256sum | cut -c1-16); m="/tmp/orbal-wiki-audit.${sid}.${h}"; [ -e "$m" ] && exit 0; touch "$m"; jq -n "{decision:\"block\",reason:\"NixOS configuration was modified. Review wiki/ for stale or missing coverage: wiki/README.md (index), wiki/runbooks/ (procedures), wiki/network-topology.md (ports/firewall), wiki/services/ (service config), wiki/architecture.md (structure). If already in sync, do nothing.\"}"

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | grep -qE '\.(nix)$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A .nix file was modified. When you finish this task, check if wiki/ docs need updating: runbooks for procedure changes, network-topology.md for firewall/port changes, services/ for service changes, architecture.md for structural changes, and README.md index for new entries."}}' || true
